strategies.name: Spot Balanced
strategies.description: Distribusi likuiditas merata di sekitar harga aktif.
strategies.entryConditions: Market sideways, volume normal, tidak ada trend kuat.
strategies.exitConditions: Kalau trend mulai terbentuk, switch ke bid-ask atau single-side.

strategies.name: Curve Concentrated
strategies.description: Likuiditas terkonsentrasi di dekat harga aktif. Fee maksimal tapi cepat out of range.
strategies.entryConditions: Market sangat sideways, volatilitas rendah, stable pair.
strategies.exitConditions: Kalau ada breakout atau volatilitas naik, segera exit.

strategies.name: Bid-Ask Wide
strategies.description: Spread lebar di dua sisi. Tahan volatile, fee terkumpul dari swing.
strategies.entryConditions: Volatilitas tinggi, volume di atas rata-rata, ada momentum.
strategies.exitConditions: Kalau market mulai stabil dan fee APR turun drastis.

strategies.name: Single-Side Token X
strategies.description: Hanya deposit token X (SOL/base token). Cocok kalau yakin harga naik.
strategies.entryConditions: Strong uptrend, buy pressure dominan > 65%, momentum kuat.
strategies.exitConditions: Kalau momentum melemah atau sentiment berubah bearish.

strategies.name: Single-Side USDC
strategies.description: Hanya deposit USDC/quote token. Cocok kalau expect harga turun lalu balik.
strategies.entryConditions: Downtrend tapi expect reversal, sell pressure dominan.
strategies.exitConditions: Kalau reversal terjadi, switch ke spot atau single-side X.
